message:
feat(widgets): Add Timer countdown widget (bd-6e9.6)

Implements TimerState (countdown with start/stop/toggle/reset/tick) and
Timer StatefulWidget reusing stopwatch format functions. Supports Human,
Digital, and Seconds formats with running/finished style overrides. 21 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
